name: Chat Message
desc: Server sends a chat message or command response to the client.

fields.name: chatComponent
fields.desc: The chat message or command response

fields.name: type
fields.desc: 0 = chat box, 1 = system message (singleplayer), 2 = above hotbar

notes: Position 0 shows in chat box. Position 2 shows above the hotbar (action bar).

modules.name: AutoGG
modules.purpose: Most commonly intercepted clientbound packet. AutoGG detects game-end messages. NameProtect replaces player name. AutoTPA auto-accepts teleport requests. AutoPlay auto-queues after game end. FlagDetector detects anti-cheat messages.
